operational_definition: Conceptually defined by WHO as waking sitting, reclining, or lying behaviour with energy expenditure ≤1.5 METs, where 1 MET approximates resting energy expenditure. Operationalized as usual sitting time in minutes/day from PAD680; analyzed per 60-minute/day and in categories <4, 4 to <6, 6 to <8, and ≥8 hours/day.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if usual sitting time from PAD680 was missing or outside the retained analytic range after cleaning.

operational_definition: WHO defines physical activity as bodily movement produced by skeletal muscles that requires energy expenditure. Operationalized as at least 150 moderate-equivalent minutes/week; vigorous minutes counted double. Frequency units were recovered from raw PAQ_L PAD790U and PAD810U fields and converted to weekly equivalents.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if moderate-equivalent minutes/week could not be derived because required self-reported frequency, duration, or frequency-unit fields were unavailable after cleaning.

operational_definition: Mean SBP ≥140 mmHg, mean DBP ≥90 mmHg, self-reported hypertension, or current antihypertensive medication.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if blood pressure measurements, self-reported hypertension diagnosis, and antihypertensive medication use were all unavailable after cleaning.

operational_definition: Self-reported physician diagnosis, HbA1c ≥6.5%, insulin use, or diabetes medication use.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if HbA1c, self-reported diabetes diagnosis, insulin use, and diabetes medication use were all unavailable after cleaning.

operational_definition: eGFR <60 mL/min/1.73m2 or urine albumin-creatinine ratio ≥30 mg/g.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if both eGFR and urine albumin-creatinine ratio were unavailable after cleaning.

operational_definition: At least two of hypertension, diabetes, and chronic kidney disease.
missing_value_criteria: Missing if hypertension, diabetes, and CKD status were all missing.
